name: openclaw-gateway
description: OpenClaw-Zero-Token 本地网关 - 支持 OpenAI 和 Anthropic Claude API

anthropic.curl: curl -X POST http://localhost:9083/v1/messages -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "x-api-key: local" -d '{"model":"claude-3-opus-20240229","max_tokens":1024,"messages":[{"role":"user","content":"你好"}]}'
